# Hibernian Hall — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An elegant Irish catering venue with a warm, sophisticated atmosphere, specializing in hosting a wide range of celebrations — from intimate bridal and baby showers to grand weddings, lively birthday parties, and polished corporate events. The venue carries a distinctly Irish charm, blending timeless elegance with heartfelt hospitality to create memorable experiences for every occasion.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover Hibernian Hall, where hospitality &amp; events meet Irish charm. From corporate events to weddings, our elegant catering venue makes every occasion unforgettable. Plan your celebration today!

### Events
https://example.com/events
Explore our versatile catering venue for baby showers, engagement parties, and grand weddings. Blending Irish warmth with polished hospitality &amp; events, we bring your vision to life. View our spaces now.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn how Hibernian Hall became a beloved venue for corporate events and personal milestones. Our story is rooted in heartfelt hospitality &amp; events, crafted to make every guest feel at home. Meet the team behind the magic.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to book the ideal venue for corporate events or your next baby shower? Reach out to Hibernian Hall and let our hospitality &amp; events experts craft a tailored celebration. Inquire now for availability.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Hibernian Hall
An elegant Irish catering venue with a warm, sophisticated atmosphere, specializing in hosting a wide range of celebrations — from intimate bridal and baby showers to grand weddings, lively birthday parties, and polished corporate events. The venue carries a distinctly Irish charm, blending timeless elegance with heartfelt hospitality to create memorable experiences for every occasion.

## Target Audience
- couples planning weddings, families celebrating milestones, corporate event planners
- Wedding Planning Couples
- Milestone Celebrating Families
- Corporate Event Planners

## Industry
Hospitality & Events

---

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
